sowing_landing_option_label: {sowing_rule_text} Which option marks the pit that receives the last seed?
{sowing_rule_text} What option letter marks the pit where the last seed lands?
{sowing_rule_text} Select the option marking the final landing pit.
{sowing_rule_text} Which option letter is on the final landing pit?
{sowing_rule_text} Which option marks the pit that gets the last seed?
post_sow_pit_count_value: {sowing_rule_text} After that move, how many seeds are in the target-marked pit?
{sowing_rule_text} What is the seed count in the target-marked pit after the move?
{sowing_rule_text} Count the seeds in the target-marked pit after the move.
{sowing_rule_text} After sowing, how many seeds does the target-marked pit contain?
{sowing_rule_text} What is the final seed count for the target-marked pit?
max_post_sow_option_label: {sowing_rule_text} After the move, which marked option pit has the most seeds?
{sowing_rule_text} Which option letter marks the pit with the largest seed count after the move?
{sowing_rule_text} Select the option whose marked pit contains the most seeds after sowing.
{sowing_rule_text} After sowing, which marked option pit has the greatest number of seeds?
{sowing_rule_text} Which option marks the highest-count pit after the move?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_low_seed: a two-row pit board with visible seeds and an arrow direction
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_mixed_seed: a two-row pit board with visible seeds and an arrow direction
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_busy_seed: a two-row pit board with visible seeds and an arrow direction
code_prompt_defaults.sowing_rule_text: Pick up all seeds from the X-marked pit and sow one seed at a time in the arrow direction.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_sowing_landing_option_la: set "annotation" to one bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected landing pit
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_sowing_landing_option_label: set "answer" to the option letter marking the final landing pit
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_post_sow_pit_count_value: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_pit" and "target_pit", each mapped to that pit bounding box as [x0,y0,x1,y1] in pixels
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_post_sow_pit_count_value: set "answer" to the integer number of seeds in the target-marked pit after the move
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_max_post_sow_option_labe: set "annotation" to one bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the winning marked option pit
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_max_post_sow_option_label: set "answer" to the option letter marking the pit with the most seeds after the move
